table-386-386.caption: Write down the ruling of Beacon of Immortality.
data: When you cast this spell, create two Treasure tokens. At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay {2}. If you don't, destroy each artifact and enchantment you control.
Create three Treasure tokens when played. Sacrifice at turn's end or lose life equal to its cost.
Generate four Treasure tokens upon casting. Must be sacrificed next upkeep or suffer damage.
Produce one Treasure token immediately. Return to hand if unpaid by maintenance phase.
Summon five Treasures on entry. Forced sacrifice triggers board wipe for non-artifacts
